# MuleSoft SFTP Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (2.7) of SFTP Connector documentation.
> See [SFTP Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sftp-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the SFTP Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [SFTP Connector 2.7](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sftp-connector/latest/index.md)
- [Connect to SFTP Servers Dynamically Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sftp-connector/latest/sftp-connection-dynamically.md)
- [Connect to an SFTP Server Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sftp-connector/latest/sftp-connection.md)
- [Troubleshooting SFTP Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sftp-connector/latest/sftp-connector-troubleshooting.md)
- [Upgrade and Migrate SFTP Connector to Version 2.x](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sftp-connector/latest/sftp-connector-upgrade-guide.md)
- [Copy and Move Files with the SFTP Connector Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sftp-connector/latest/sftp-copy-move.md)
- [Create a Directory Using SFTP Connector Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sftp-connector/latest/sftp-create-directory.md)
- [SFTP Connector 2.7 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sftp-connector/latest/sftp-documentation.md)
- [SFTP Connector Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sftp-connector/latest/sftp-examples.md)
- [List Files Using the SFTP Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sftp-connector/latest/sftp-list.md)
- [Trigger a Flow When a New File Is Created or Modified Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sftp-connector/latest/sftp-on-new-file.md)
- [Disable Pooling in the SFTP Connector Configuration](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sftp-connector/latest/sftp-pooling.md)
- [Configure Preferred Authentication](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sftp-connector/latest/sftp-preferred-authentication.md)
- [Read a File Using the SFTP Connector Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sftp-connector/latest/sftp-read.md)
- [Configure Security Parameters of SSH Connection](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sftp-connector/latest/sftp-security-configuration-override.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure SFTP Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sftp-connector/latest/sftp-studio.md)
- [Write a File Using the SFTP Connector Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sftp-connector/latest/sftp-write.md)
- [SFTP Connector XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sftp-connector/latest/sftp-xml-maven.md)
